file_insights.changes: Added recover_orphans async function (62 lines) + 6 test cases (50 lines)
integration_points: bop_core::Meta - uses Default::default() for minimal recovery state
quicklook::render_card_thumbnail() - updates UI after card move

patterns_discovered.description: When meta.json is corrupt/missing, create minimal Meta struct with id and stage='pending', then write it back
patterns_discovered.benefit: Orphaned cards remain recoverable even with data corruption

patterns_discovered.description: First read PID file (returns Option<i32>), then verify process exists with is_alive(). Treats missing PID as orphaned.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Catches both genuinely dead processes and cards with missing PID files

patterns_discovered.description: Only process directories ending in '.bop' extension to distinguish cards from other filesystem objects
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents processing non-card artifacts in running_dir

patterns_discovered.description: Failed meta read/write operations use `let _ = ...` to suppress errors while continuing recovery flow
patterns_discovered.benefit: Function completes even if auxiliary operations fail (e.g., meta write)

patterns_discovered.description: 6 tests covering: dead PIDs, corrupt meta, missing meta, live PIDs, empty dir, missing PID file
patterns_discovered.benefit: Catches edge cases that frequently cause field failures

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: PID file absence vs. PID value absence
gotchas_discovered.issue: read_pid() returns Result<Option<i32>>. Missing file (Ok(None)) and dead process (Some(pid) where !is_alive) both qualify as orphaned, but require different handling paths.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Code correctly checks both branches: `match pid { Some(pid) => !is_alive(pid), None => true }`

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Meta.json corruption doesn't fail the function
gotchas_discovered.issue: Corrupt JSON in meta.json causes serde failure, but card is still validly orphaned and moveable. Cannot assume metadata validity.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Catches serde error with `Err(_)`, creates minimal Meta with id extracted from directory name

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Directory name parsing required for fallback ID
gotchas_discovered.issue: If meta.json missing/corrupt, must extract card ID from directory name (e.g., 'card-id.bop' -> 'card-id'). directory name could be malformed.
is_alive() returns true if process ALIVE, but logic needs true if process DEAD. Easy to invert accidentally.

recommendations.item: Add logging/metrics for recovered card counts and recovery failure reasons to track field orphan frequency
Document the minimal Meta schema created during recovery (id + stage='pending' + defaults) in code comments or spec
Add integration test verifying recovered cards can complete their pipeline (move through pending->running->done without regression)
If recover_orphans runs on startup, consider caching PID lookups or batching is_alive() calls to avoid syscall overhead
Consider idempotency: if card already in pending/, fs::rename silently fails—add explicit check to avoid silent loss of recovery intent
